name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Band Strip
notes: Kerdi-Band is a waterproofing strip for sealing butt joints and floor/wall connections with Kerdi and Ditra membranes. It is installed with unmodified thinset to ensure a fully water-tight seal to prevent leaks. The 4 mil thickness of the Kerdi-Band helps prevent build up under the tile.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Board Bench Rectangular | 38x11-1/2
notes: Kerdi-Board-SB is a prefabricated shower bench designed to integrate with the Schluter-Shower-System. It is lightweight, waterproof and ready to tile making installation quick and easy. The bench is made of Kerdi-Board and comes with Kerdi-Kereck waterproofing corners.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Board Bench Triangular | 24x24
notes: Kerdi-Board-SB is a prefabricated shower bench designed to integrate with the Schluter-Shower-System. It is lightweight, waterproof and ready to tile making installation quick and easy. The bench is made of Kerdi-Board and comes with Kerdi-Kereck waterproofing corners.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Board Hardware Set
notes: The KBZS35GT32Z is a hardware set consisting of screws and washers designed for the installation of Kerdi-Board. It is used to fasten Kerdi-Board to stud framing. The set contains 40 screws and 40 washers.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Board Niche | 12x12
notes: Kerdi-Board-SN 12 in. x 12 in. Shower Niche is a prefabricated shower niche made of Schluter-Kerdi-Board. Lightweight for ease of installing. Waterproof for your shower installation.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Board Niche | 12x20
notes: Kerdi-Board-SN 12 in. x 20 in. Shower Niche is a prefabricated shower niche made of Schluter-Kerdi-Board. Lightweight for ease of installing. Waterproof niche once installed is ready for tiling.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Board Niche | 12x28
notes: Kerdi-Board-SN 12 in. x 28 in. Shower Niche is a prefabricated shower niche made of Schluter-Kerdi-Board. Lightweight for ease of installation. Waterproof niche once installed is ready for tiling.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Board Panel | 1/2" 48x96
notes: Kerdi-Board is a multifunctional tile substrate and building panel that can be used for creating bonded waterproofing assemblies with tile coverings. Kerdi-Board is made from an extruded polystyrene foam panel, with a special reinforcement material on both sides and fleece webbing for effective anchoring in thinset mortar. It can be used in the creation of a broad range of building elements, such as showers and bathtub surrounds.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Board Shower Curb | 48"
notes: Kerdi-Board-SC is a lightweight, prefabricated shower curb. It is made of Kerdi-Board and is designed to integrate with the Schluter-Shower System. This curb is waterproof and only the joints and corners need to be sealed to complete waterproofing.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Board Shower Curb | 60"
notes: Kerdi-Board-SC is a lightweight, prefabricated shower curb. It is made of Kerdi-Board and is designed to integrate with the Schluter-Shower System. This curb is waterproof and only the joints and corners need to be sealed to complete waterproofing.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Drain Grate | 4" SS
notes: The Kerdi-Drain grate is designed for use with the Kerdi-Drain flange which is sold separate. The 4 in. square drain grate comes with a frame, height adjustment collar and lateral adjustment ring. The grate accommodates tiles 1/4 in. to 1-1/4 in. thick and allows for lateral and tilt adjustment. The Kerdi-Drain grate can be used in both commercial and residential applications.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Drain PVC Flange | 2"
notes: The Kerdi-Drain flange is designed for use with the Kerdi-Shower-T/-TS/-TT shower trays and mortar bed shower applications. The package contains a bonding flange, Kerdi-Kereck waterproof corners, Kerdi-Seal mixing valve seal and Kerdi-Seal pipe seal. The Kerdi-Drain flange can be used in both commercial and residential applications. This flange is to be used with Kerdi-Drain grates which are sold separate.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Drain Tileable Kit | 4"
notes: The Kerdi-Drain grate is designed for use with the Kerdi-Drain flange which is sold separate. The 4 in. square tileable drain support comes with a spacer and lateral adjustment ring. The Kerdi-Drain grate can be used in both commercial and residential applications.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Fix Sealant | Gray
notes: Kerdi-Fix is a single-component sealing and bonding compound with a silane-modified polymer base. It is elastomeric and bonds well to most materials. Kerdi-Fix is odor-neutral, UV- and weather-resistant, and contains no solvents. It is suitable for use as a sealant and can be used to bond Kerdi-Band and Kerdi waterproofing membrane to fixed building elements.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Fix Sealant | White
notes: Kerdi-Fix is a single-component sealing and bonding compound with a silane-modified polymer base. It is elastomeric and bonds well to most materials. Kerdi-Fix is odor-neutral, UV- and weather-resistant, and contains no solvents. It is suitable for use as a sealant and can be used to bond Kerdi-Band and Kerdi waterproofing membrane to fixed building elements.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Kereck Inside Corners
notes: Kerdi-Kereck-F are preformed, seamless corners for waterproofing the corners of Kerdi and Ditra assemblies to prevent leaks. The 4 mil thickness helps minimize build-up in the corners. The KERECK/FI2 is a package of 2 inside corners.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Kereck Outside Corners
notes: Kerdi-Kereck-F are preformed, seamless corners for waterproofing the corners of Kerdi and Ditra assemblies to prevent leaks. The 4 mil thickness helps minimize build-up in the corners. The KERECK/FA2 is a package of 2 outside corners.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi Membrane | 323sqft
notes: KERDI200200/15M is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. This 6 ft. 7 in. wide roll covers the wall from the floor to a standard shower head height. This creates fewer seams and a quicker installation time. The membrane is 8 mil thick and features an anchoring fleece on both sides to anchor it in thin-set mortar. Kerdi eliminates water damage which can lead to mold and mildew.

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi Membrane | 39x65

name: Material | Tile | Kerdi-Seal Pipe Seal | 3/4"
notes: Kerdi-Seal-PS is a prefabricated waterproofing seal with over-molded rubber gasket. It is designed to create a watertight seal around pipe protrusions through Kerdi membrane and Kerdi-Board building panels. The seals are made of Kerdi and the 4-mil thickness helps minimize build-up.
